allowed_language: THINGS H I structure is a pilot external morphology diagnostic consistent with the juvenile/unsettled-disk interpretation.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim a direct BDVR activation measurement in THINGS, a THINGS rotation-curve refit, or that transferred A_gov_inferred validates BDVR.
claim_boundary: This is an external diagnostic using computed H I structure proxies and M9 activation transfer; it is not a direct refit of BDVR to THINGS rotation curves.

allowed_language: MaNGA provides large-N scalar proxy coherence for maturity/compactness trends.
forbidden_claims: Do not label MaNGA A_proxy as A_gov_inferred or direct BDVR activation; do not call DAPall scalar velocities v_flat.
claim_boundary: This is a MaNGA large-sample governor proxy diagnostic, not a direct BDVR activation, not a SPARC-like flat-velocity fit, and not a dark-matter-law validation.

allowed_language: ATLAS3D fast rotators occupy a mixed rotation/dispersion bridge proxy branch.
forbidden_claims: Do not call the ATLAS3D bridge response direct BDVR activation, A_gov_inferred, or a per-galaxy tuned coefficient fit.
claim_boundary: This is an ATLAS3D mixed rotation/dispersion bridge proxy, not a disk BDVR activation, not A_gov_inferred, and not a per-galaxy tuned model.

allowed_language: Ellipticals require a separate pressure-channel observable mapping.
forbidden_claims: Do not use disk v_flat language, A_gov_inferred, or claim lensing/X-ray validation is complete.
claim_boundary: Ellipticals require a separate observable mapping. This is an ATLAS3D pressure-channel proxy, not v_flat, not A_gov_inferred, not a disk BDVR activation, and not direct lensing/X-ray/dynamical-excess validation.

allowed_language: xGASS/xCOLD GASS gas and depletion observables support the maturity-proxy ordering.
forbidden_claims: Do not call gas-depletion maturity a rotation-curve test or direct BDVR validation; do not imply dark matter is unnecessary.
claim_boundary: This is an external diagnostic test, not a validated evolutionary reconstruction, and not a direct rotation-curve test.
